---
title: "About Me!"
---

# Club Involvement:
### SEEDS club
I joined the SEEDS club this quarter and was lucky to join their trip to the Sierra Nevada Aquatic Research Lab . They also recently held a cynotyping event that was a a lot of fun! 

[add picture] 

# Work

I work at the Ojai Farmers market on Sundays for Wild Local Seafood Co. I enjoy representing a sustainable local fisherman’s business and educating customers.

# Hobbies
In my limited free time, I enjoy cooking, baking, crafting, and doing art. 
My favorite thing to cook/make is probably spring rolls. 

[add picture carousel?]
